mapper.sql: id, name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_category WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND enabled = #{enabled}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_category
id, name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_category SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_category (id, name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
